title: Report of the 1979 Pre-International Pearl Millet Downy Mildew Nursery -(IPMDMN)
abstract:
The acceptance of the concept of multilocational testing for identification of stable disease resistance led in 1976 
to the establishment of the international pearl millet Disease Resistance Testing Program containing the International Pearl Millet Downy Mildew Nursery (IPMDMN), In the IPMDMN 40-50 elite resistant materials are tested by cooperators throughout India and West Africa for reactions to the local downy mildew populations...
